title: Code::XtremeApps
subtitle: AI hackathon project that classifies recyclable materials from camera images and identifies products via barcode decoding.

sections.title: Project Overview
sections.body: Trained and fine-tuned a Python/TensorFlow transfer-learning model to classify recyclable materials from camera images, with barcode decoding for product identification. Built and demonstrated an end-to-end IoT prototype on Raspberry Pi with camera capture, remote inference, and a points-based user flow in 24 hours.

highlights: Trained and fine-tuned a transfer-learning model in Python/TensorFlow to classify recyclable materials from camera images.
Integrated barcode decoding for product identification alongside the image classification pipeline.
Built an end-to-end Raspberry Pi IoT prototype with camera capture, remote inference, and a points-based user flow in 24 hours.
Earned a Certificate of Achievement at Code::XtremeApps 2019 by IMDA.
